dataSourceInstructions:
Graph ontology for the London bike-share fleet. Use ONLY for entity lookups and relationship traversals — NEVER for aggregations, counts, averages, or rankings.

ENTITY TYPES (12):
  Station — bike docking station (PK: station_key, Display: street_address)
  Neighbourhood — London area (PK: neighbourhood_key, Display: neighbourhood_name)
  TimeSlot — hour of day 0-23 (PK: time_key, Display: hour_label)
  CalendarDate — calendar date (PK: date_key YYYYMMDD, Display: date_value)
  WeatherObservation — hourly weather (PK: weather_key, Display: weather_description)
  AvailabilityEvent — station availability snapshot (PK: availability_key)
  HourlyDemand — hourly demand per neighbourhood (PK: demand_key)
  RebalancingAssessment — rebalancing recommendation (PK: rebalance_key)
  WeatherImpact — weather effect on demand (PK: weather_impact_key)
  StationSnapshot — current station status, 1 row per station (PK: station_key)
  RecentAvailability — last 24h hourly per station (PK: recent_key)
  DemandForecast — ML predictions 24h ahead (PK: forecast_key)

RELATIONSHIPS (23):
  Station ← AvailabilityEvent (located_at, station_key)
  Station ← RebalancingAssessment (assessed_for, station_key)
  Station ← StationSnapshot (current_snapshot, station_key)
  Station ← RecentAvailability (recent_at_station, station_key)
  Neighbourhood ← HourlyDemand (measured_in, neighbourhood_key)
  Neighbourhood ← RebalancingAssessment (rebalance_in_zone, neighbourhood_key)
  Neighbourhood ← WeatherImpact (impacts_zone, neighbourhood_key)
  Neighbourhood ← DemandForecast (forecast_for_zone, neighbourhood_key)
  TimeSlot ← AvailabilityEvent (occurred_during, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← HourlyDemand (demand_at_time, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← RebalancingAssessment (rebalance_at_time, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← WeatherImpact (impact_at_time, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← RecentAvailability (recent_at_time, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← DemandForecast (forecast_at_time, time_key)
  TimeSlot ← WeatherObservation (observed_during, time_key)
  CalendarDate ← AvailabilityEvent (event_on_date, date_key)
  CalendarDate ← HourlyDemand (demand_on_date, date_key)
  CalendarDate ← RebalancingAssessment (assessed_on_date, date_key)
  CalendarDate ← WeatherImpact (impact_on_date, date_key)
  CalendarDate ← RecentAvailability (recent_on_date, date_key)
  CalendarDate ← DemandForecast (forecast_on_date, date_key)
  WeatherObservation ← RebalancingAssessment (rebalance_during_weather, weather_key)
  WeatherObservation ← WeatherImpact (affected_by, weather_key)

WHEN TO USE THIS SOURCE:
  ✓ 'Show me station Albert Gate' → entity lookup
  ✓ 'What events happened at station X?' → traverse Station → AvailabilityEvent
  ✓ 'What weather was observed during rebalancing at station Y?' → multi-hop traversal
  ✓ 'What rebalancing was done in Mile End?' → Neighbourhood → RebalancingAssessment
  ✓ 'Show me everything connected to the 08:00 time slot' → TimeSlot fan-out
  ✓ 'What forecast exists for Hackney?' → Neighbourhood → DemandForecast

WHEN NOT TO USE THIS SOURCE (use lakehouse SQL instead):
  ✗ 'How many stations are empty?' → aggregation (use gold_station_snapshot)
  ✗ 'Average utilization across neighbourhoods' → aggregation (use fact tables)
  ✗ 'Top 10 busiest stations' → ranking (use lakehouse SQL)
  ✗ 'Total rebalancing cost' → SUM (use fact_rebalancing)
userDescription: Graph ontology for navigating bike-share fleet entities and their relationships. 12 entity types (stations, neighbourhoods, time, dates, weather, facts, forecasts) connected by 23 relationships. Use for entity lookups and relationship traversals only — not aggregations.

elements.description: Bike docking station with location, capacity, and status
London neighbourhood with station count and health score
Hour of day (0-23) with rush hour and demand tier
Calendar date with weekend, season, and day-of-week
Hourly weather: temperature, wind, precipitation, comfort index
Station availability snapshot with bikes, docks, utilization
Hourly demand per neighbourhood with intensity metrics
Rebalancing recommendation with priority, action, and cost
Weather effect on demand: suppression/boost multiplier
Current station status — 1 row per station, latest event
ML demand predictions 24h ahead with confidence intervals
